response.justification: The candidate brings solid full-stack engineering fundamentals and genuine high-throughput distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic), but is missing the core domain expertise this role demands. There is no evidence of experimentation platform work, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, rollout automation, or telemetry/metrics systems — the primary technical competencies of the position. The career trajectory demonstrates strong Senior/Staff-level individual contribution but falls short of the cross-team architectural leadership and multi-workstream initiative ownership expected at IC6/Principal. Growth engineering and statistical analysis experience, both required, are entirely absent.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second using async I/O, caching, and low-latency design patterns
Polyglot engineer with production experience across TypeScript, C++, Java, DLang, and Node.js, covering several of the role's required languages
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling work at re:cinq aligns with the cloud AI and developer tools industry context of the role
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation, bias detection, or guardrail systems appear anywhere in the resume
No telemetry pipeline, metrics infrastructure, or growth measurement background; data aptitude appears operational rather than analytical or statistical

No demonstrated Principal/IC6-level leadership: no evidence of owning multi-team initiatives, setting technical direction across organizations, or translating ambiguous business goals into measurable engineering systems
